visualizationReason: JJK is defined by technique counters and power hierarchies — the counter-tree maps how abilities nullify, exploit, and amplify each other.

powerSystem.name: Cursed Energy
powerSystem.subtitle: Raw Negative Output
powerSystem.loreDesc: The unrefined output of human negativity that leaks from humans and coalesces into autonomous Cursed Spirits.
powerSystem.systemDesc: The foundational raw processing power. Behaving similarly to anti-matter, it is destructive to biological tissue.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Yuji Itadori learning to perfectly sync his physical strikes with explosive bursts of raw Cursed Energy.

powerSystem.name: Cursed Technique
powerSystem.subtitle: Genetic Proprietary Firmware
powerSystem.loreDesc: A proprietary innate ability hardcoded into a sorcerer's genetics, varying from physical enhancements to spatial manipulation.
powerSystem.systemDesc: Proprietary software hardcoded into biological hardware (the right prefrontal cortex). Cannot be learned or downloaded.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Gojo explaining the Limitless technique using the convergence and divergence of an infinite series.

powerSystem.name: Reverse Cursed Technique
powerSystem.subtitle: Positron Healing Protocol
powerSystem.loreDesc: A complex process of multiplying negative energy against itself to create positive energy, primarily used for healing.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A mathematical compilation process triggering a restorative protocol by synthesizing positive energy to cure flesh and poisons.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Satoru Gojo ascending and resurrecting himself from the brink of death after being gutted by Toji Fushiguro.

powerSystem.name: Domain Expansion
powerSystem.subtitle: Isolated Virtual Sandbox
powerSystem.loreDesc: The pinnacle of Jujutsu sorcery, requiring immense energy to render a physical cognitive barrier around the target.
powerSystem.systemDesc: The creation of an isolated, sandboxed virtual environment granting the creator total root access with a guaranteed-hit function.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Gojo deploying Unlimited Void to instantly paralyze the disaster curses by flooding their brains with infinite data.

rankings.topTierLore: Anomalous individuals possessing power so immense and unconventional they are capable of single-handedly overthrowing an entire nation.
rankings.topTierSystem: Root administrators possessing infinite looping capabilities, uncatchable memory overflow bugs, or system-wide overwrite permissions.

tiers.name: Grade 1
tiers.loreDesc: The pinnacle of normative jujutsu power leading major operations and establishing the standard for excellence.
tiers.systemDesc: Highly optimized executive functions running critical continuous operations with maximum efficiency.

tiers.name: Grade 2
tiers.loreDesc: Highly capable operatives utilized for independent tactical strikes and solo missions against significant threats.
tiers.systemDesc: Stable background services executing complex tasks reliably without requiring oversight.

tiers.name: Grade 3
tiers.loreDesc: Average sorcerers tracking standardized targets and providing support to higher-ranked operatives.
tiers.systemDesc: Standard user applications processing expected inputs within normal operational parameters.

tiers.name: Grade 4
tiers.loreDesc: Inexperienced learners and entry-level sorcerers deployed only against the weakest of curses.
tiers.systemDesc: Low-priority, localized scripts with limited permissions handling minor background noise.

characters.name: Satoru Gojo
characters.title: The Anomaly
characters.loreBio: The strongest jujutsu sorcerer of the modern era, whose birth shifted the balance of the world. Wields the Limitless and Six Eyes.
characters.systemBio: A transcendent node operating with an infinite defense protocol (Limitless) and a zero-consumption energy loop (Six Eyes).
characters.signatureMoment: Stating 'Throughout Heaven and Earth, I alone am the honored one' while floating in the sky.

characters.name: Ryomen Sukuna
characters.title: King of Curses
characters.loreBio: An ancient, undefeated sorcerer from the Heian Era who incarnated as a cursed object inside Yuji Itadori.
characters.systemBio: A catastrophic legacy virus possessing an open-barrier ('Divine') Domain that executes localized overwrites of physical laws.
characters.signatureMoment: Activating Malevolent Shrine in Shibuya to vaporize a massive radius of the city into dust.

characters.name: Kenjaku
characters.title: The Architect
characters.loreBio: An ancient, parasitic sorcerer who hops bodies across centuries, seeking to force the evolution of humanity.
characters.systemBio: A persistent, body-hopping malware orchestrating massive causal shifts like the Shibuya Incident and the Culling Game.
characters.signatureMoment: Removing his cranial cap to reveal a terrifying, teeth-baring brain orchestrating the sealing of Satoru Gojo.

characters.name: Yuta Okkotsu
characters.title: The Prodigy
characters.loreBio: A prodigy bound to the Queen of Curses, Rika, granting him infinite cursed energy and the ability to copy techniques.
characters.systemBio: A high-capacity node functioning with boundless energy reserves, unconditionally mimicking foreign Cursed Technique code.
characters.signatureMoment: Kissing the horrifying curse Rika to fully manifest her boundless power against Suguru Geto.

characters.name: Toji Fushiguro
characters.title: The Sorcerer Killer
characters.loreBio: An assassin born with a Heavenly Restriction that stripped him of cursed energy in exchange for apex physical prowess.
characters.systemBio: A systemic bug with absolute zero Cursed Energy; completely untrackable by targeting algorithms and immune to Domain sure-hits.
characters.signatureMoment: Bypassing the Six Eyes' perception entirely, plunging a blade through Gojo's chest.

characters.name: Maki Zenin
characters.title: The Destroyer
characters.loreBio: A rejected member of the Zenin clan who fully realized her Heavenly Restriction after her sister Mai's sacrifice.
characters.systemBio: The second iteration of the zero-energy anomaly. Exists completely off the grid and systematically dismantled the Zenin establishment.
characters.signatureMoment: Massacring the entirety of the corrupt Zenin Clan single-handedly after unlocking her true physical potential.

factions.name: Tokyo Jujutsu High
factions.loreDesc: A militarized educational facility acting as a progressive faction sheltering anomalies under Gojo's influence.
factions.systemDesc: A decentralized hub sheltering outlier nodes and fostering systemic evolutionary variables against central authorities.

factions.name: The Zenin Clan
factions.loreDesc: A highly toxic, aristocratic family operating strictly on genetic determinism, inheriting coveted techniques from the Heian Era.
factions.systemDesc: A legacy framework structured hierarchically on genetic code inheritance, ultimately annihilated by its own unhandled exceptions.

factions.name: The Higher-Ups
factions.loreDesc: A shadowy, conservative council maintaining the status quo and routinely issuing execution orders for anomalies.
factions.systemDesc: The central administrative authority enforcing rigid compliance standards and suppressing unpredictable system variables.

rules.name: Genetic Immortality of Techniques
rules.subtitle: Hardware-Bound Firmware
rules.loreConsequence: A sorcerer's technique is etched into their brain at birth. Overheating it causes a temporary loss of access.
rules.systemEquivalent: Firmware hardcoded onto a motherboard. Cannot be rewritten without physically destroying and recreating the sector.

rules.name: The Absolute Law of Vows
rules.subtitle: Lethal Smart Contracts
rules.loreConsequence: Mutual Binding Vows are bound by reality. Breaking one results in an undefined, catastrophic backlash that destroys the violator.
rules.systemEquivalent: A cryptographic smart contract. Deviation from the executable code triggers a localized system crash, bricking the offending node.

rules.name: Culling Game Compliance
rules.subtitle: Mandatory OS Update
rules.loreConsequence: Participants must abide by the tournament rules. Violations result in Cursed Technique Removal and instant death.
rules.systemEquivalent: An unyielding OS firmware update. Applications failing compliance are force-quit and permanently uninstalled.

anomalies.name: Zero Cursed Energy
anomalies.loreDesc: Toji Fushiguro and Maki Zenin, born without energy but granted apex physical prowess.
anomalies.systemDesc: Untrackable physical variables entirely invisible to the universe's Cursed Energy targeting algorithms.

causalEvents.name: The Shibuya Incident
causalEvents.trigger: Kenjaku orchestrates a massive, coordinates assault on Halloween using disaster curses.
causalEvents.consequence: Satoru Gojo is sealed, plunging the world into chaos and reviving Sukuna.
causalEvents.loreDesc: Kenjaku orchestrated the sealing of Satoru Gojo, crashing the geopolitical equilibrium of the entire world.
causalEvents.systemDesc: A targeted system crash removing the load-bearing pillar of global Jujutsu stability, unleashing millions of dormant malicious variables.

causalEvents.name: The Culling Game
causalEvents.trigger: Kenjaku remotely activates thousands of modern sorcerers via mass Idle Transfiguration.
causalEvents.consequence: Japan is locked into a nationwide death tournament to optimize cursed energy.
causalEvents.loreDesc: A nationwide death game forcing the rapid evolution of humanity by optimizing cursed energy through mass slaughter.
causalEvents.systemDesc: A malicious OS update disguised as a Binding Vow protocol where only the most violently optimized code will survive the sequence.

relationships.loreDesc: The strongest sorcerer vs the King of Curses — a fated clash across millennia.
relationships.systemDesc: Two maximum-output processes competing for singular system dominance.

relationships.loreDesc: Gojo stands as the primary obstacle to Kenjaku's thousand-year plan.
relationships.systemDesc: Firewall vs persistent rootkit — each designed specifically to counter the other.

relationships.loreDesc: Gojo vouched for Yuta's life and trained him as his successor.
relationships.systemDesc: Senior admin provisioning root-level access to a junior node.

relationships.loreDesc: A temporary alliance of ancient evils — mutual convenience, not trust.
relationships.systemDesc: Two legacy processes forming a runtime alliance against the modern OS.

relationships.loreDesc: Both achieved zero cursed energy — Toji's path foreshadowed Maki's transformation.
relationships.systemDesc: Two instances of the same zero-dependency exploit, generations apart.

relationships.loreDesc: Yuta carries Gojo's will to stop Sukuna — the torch passed to the next generation.
relationships.systemDesc: Successor process inheriting the mission to terminate the rogue daemon.

relationships.loreDesc: Kenjaku's Culling Game needed Sukuna's vessel as a critical piece.
relationships.systemDesc: Orchestrator process dependent on a specific runtime instance for execution.

relationships.loreDesc: The man with zero cursed energy who nearly killed the strongest sorcerer alive.
relationships.systemDesc: A hardware-only exploit that bypassed the most advanced software defense in the system.

counterplay.mechanic: The Inverted Spear of Heaven nullifies all cursed techniques on contact, bypassing Infinity entirely.
Both domains clash — Malevolent Shrine's guaranteed-hit slashes versus Unlimited Void's infinite information flood.
Yuta's ability to copy any cursed technique makes him adaptable to counter any single strategy.
